# Rocking Rad Spray Foam LLC

> Spray foam insulation contractor serving Oklahoma. Woman-owned, minority-owned, BBB A+ rated, licensed home builders. Based in Ada, OK.

## Company Info

- Name: Rocking Rad Spray Foam LLC
- Phone: (580) 320-5620
- Email: rockingradsprayfoam@gmail.com
- Location: Ada, Oklahoma 74820
- Hours: Mon–Fri 7 AM – 5 PM, Sat by appointment
- Founded: 2019
- Projects Completed: 500+
- Google Rating: 5.0 stars
- Facebook Recommendation: 94%
- BBB Rating: A+
- Certifications: Woman-Owned, Minority-Owned, Licensed Home Builders

## Services

### Open Cell Spray Foam Insulation
- R-Value: R-3.7 per inch
- Price: $0.44–$0.65 per board foot
- Best for: Attics, interior walls, ceilings, soundproofing
- URL: /services/open-cell-spray-foam-insulation

### Closed Cell Spray Foam Insulation
- R-Value: R-6.5 to R-7.0 per inch
- Price: $1.00–$1.60 per board foot
- Best for: Metal buildings, crawl spaces, exterior walls, moisture-prone areas
- URL: /services/closed-cell-spray-foam-insulation

### Attic Insulation & Air Sealing
- R-Value: R-20 to R-38 (depending on thickness)
- Price: $3,600–$8,000 for typical home
- Best for: Existing homes with poor attic insulation, high energy bills
- URL: /services/attic-insulation

### Metal Building & Pole Barn Insulation
- R-Value: R-13 to R-14 at 2" closed cell
- Price: $4,000–$12,000
- Best for: Shops, barns, agricultural buildings, quonset huts, shipping containers
- URL: /services/metal-building-insulation

### Commercial & Industrial Insulation
- Pricing: Project-dependent
- Best for: Offices, retail, warehouses, restaurants, churches, new construction
- URL: /services/commercial-insulation

## Service Areas
Ada (home base), Oklahoma City, Norman, Tulsa, Shawnee, McAlester, Durant, Ardmore, Stillwater, and surrounding communities across Oklahoma.

## Typical Savings
- Residential energy bill reduction: 30–50%
- Metal building energy reduction: 40–60%
- Average payback period: 3–5 years
- Spray foam lifespan: Permanent (life of building)

- Rayce Stephens: Co-owner, lead operator / on-site installation
